events.name: New York Jets at Atlanta Falcons
Green Bay Packers at Cincinnati Bengals

headlines.description: — Green Bay Packers kicker Mason Crosby fell into a nightmarish Sunday as the afternoon grew late and a stiff wind kept the flag billowing right to left in Paul Brown Stadium.
headlines.shortLinkText: Crosby hits 49-yarder after 3 misses, Packers top Bengals

headlines.description: — Mike Zimmer has seen enough game-deciding kicks in eight years as coach of the Minnesota Vikings, with outcomes more often than not favoring the other team, that he usually turns away.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vikings survive Lions rally 19-17 on Joseph FG at final gun

headlines.description: — Ben Roethlisberger and the Pittsburgh Steelers silenced the noise. At least for a week.
headlines.shortLinkText: Roethlisberger throws 2 TDs, Steelers top Broncos 27-19

events.name: Miami Dolphins at Tampa Bay Buccaneers

headlines.description: — Antonio Brown is 33 years old and no longer the top playmaker on his team. With Tom Brady's help on and off the field, though, the oft-troubled receiver is making the most of an opportunity to revive his career with the Tampa Bay Buccaneers.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brady's 5 TD passes to pace Bucs' 45-17 rout of Dolphins

headlines.description: — After Jameis Winston connected with Marquez Callaway on a Hail Mary touchdown on the final play of the first half, Sean Payton recalled a similar play in his first season as New Orleans Saints coach.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hail Mary Saints: Winston has 4 TDs, Saints beat Washington

headlines.description: — Jalen Hurts was quiet in the run game for the better part of three quarters, often handing off on zone-read options instead of keeping the ball.
headlines.shortLinkText: Hurts runs for 2 TDs, Eagles come back to top Panthers 21-18

headlines.description: — Derrick Henry enjoyed another happy homecoming while continuing to torment his hometown team.
headlines.shortLinkText: Henry scores 3 TDs; Titans send Jags to 20th straight loss

events.name: New England Patriots at Houston Texans

headlines.description: — Trailing on the road in the fourth quarter, the New England Patriots needed Mac Jones to deliver on Sunday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Patriots use late field goal to get 25-22 win over Texans

events.name: Chicago Bears at Las Vegas Raiders

headlines.description: — Justin Fields hyperextended his left leg and got the wind knocked out of him on a tackle in the second quarter. Although Chicago's rookie quarterback was seriously shaken up, he walked to the sideline and only stayed there for two plays before...
headlines.shortLinkText: Fields throws 1st TD pass, Bears' defense dominates in Vegas

events.name: Cleveland Browns at Los Angeles Chargers

headlines.description: — Justin Herbert and the Los Angeles Chargers showed early in the season they can rally to win close games on the road.
headlines.shortLinkText: Herbert's 398 yards, Ekeler 3 TDs lead Chargers over Browns

events.name: New York Giants at Dallas Cowboys

headlines.description: — Dak Prescott celebrated until the end with more than 90,000 fans in his home stadium for a third consecutive week — and third straight win for the rolling Dallas Cowboys.
headlines.shortLinkText: Prescott, Cowboys beat Giants 44-20 year after ankle injury

headlines.description: — Zach Allen will enjoy his postgame trip to Shake Shack after an exhausting, physical win over the San Francisco 49ers. He and the rest of the Arizona Cardinals' defense certainly deserve a burger or two.
headlines.shortLinkText: Cardinals use Hopkins, stellar defense to beat 49ers 17-10

events.name: Buffalo Bills at Kansas City Chiefs

headlines.description: — Bills quarterback Josh Allen scrambled to the left on the mushy turf in Arrowhead Stadium, saw the Chiefs defensive back go low for the tackle and made like an Olympian by leaping over him for a first down.
headlines.shortLinkText: Allen, Bills beat Chiefs 38-20 in AFC title game rematch
